title: Oral Direct Factor Xa Inhibitor Rivaroxaban in Patients With Acute Symptomatic Deep-Vein Thrombosis or Pulmonary Embolism
inclusion_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:
- Confirmed acute symptomatic proximal DVT without symptomatic PE OR Confirmed acute symptomatic PE with or without symptomatic DVT
exclusion_criteria:
Legal lower age limitations (country specific)
- Thrombectomy, insertion of a caval filter, or use of a fibrinolytic agent to treat the current episode of DVT and/or PE
- Other indication for VKA than DVT and/or PE
locations: Amrita Institute of medical Science  and Research Centre
PD Hinduja National Hospital and Research Center
